thermal_config.description: Configuration for the unified thermal balance model.

thermal_efficiency.description: Thermal input efficiency coefficient (how effectively the heat pump changes indoor temperature). Equivalent to the old 'heating_rate' parameter.

heat_loss_coefficient.description: Rate at which building loses/gains heat to/from environment. Equivalent to the old 'cooling_constant' parameter.

thermal_inertia.description: System response lag in hours. Time delay between power application and temperature effect.

target_temperature.description: Target temperature setpoint(s) to maintain. Can be a single value or an array for variable setpoints over time.

min_temperatures.description: Minimum allowed temperatures per timestep. Defines the lower comfort boundary.

max_temperatures.description: Maximum allowed temperatures per timestep. Defines the upper comfort boundary.

supply_temperature.description: Heat pump supply temperature for heating mode in °C. Typical values: 30-50°C for underfloor heating, 45-55°C for radiators.

carnot_efficiency.description: Carnot efficiency factor for heating (0.35-0.45). Represents real-world efficiency as fraction of theoretical maximum.

supply_temperature.description: Heat pump supply temperature for cooling mode in °C. Typical values: 7-18°C depending on system type.

carnot_efficiency.description: Carnot efficiency factor for cooling (0.35-0.5). Represents real-world efficiency as fraction of theoretical maximum.

u_value.description: Overall heat transfer coefficient (U-value) in W/(m²·K). Measures the insulation properties of the building envelope.

envelope_area.description: Total building envelope surface area (walls + roof + floor + windows) in m².

ventilation_rate.description: Air changes per hour (ACH). Rate at which indoor air is replaced with outdoor air.

heated_volume.description: Total volume of heated/cooled space in m³.

window_area.description: Total window area in m². Used for solar gain calculations.

shgc.description: Solar Heat Gain Coefficient (0-1). Fraction of solar radiation that becomes heat inside the building.

internal_gains_factor.description: Factor (0-1) representing what fraction of electrical load becomes useful internal heat gains.
